data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of depending on multiple targets.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of depending on multiple targets, but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that such functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case describes a scenario where a stylist's availability is contingent on front desk coverage, but it lacks concrete evidence of the dependency rules being enforced or validated through API reads or state checks. This indicates a gap in the requirement's coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing the ability to depend on multiple targets (all, any, or threshold modes) is enforced in the system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to depend on multiple targets.
